allow: PowerShell(git status --short; Write-Output "---DIFF STAT---"; git diff --stat; Write-Output "---BUILD DIRS---"; Get-ChildItem -Directory | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; Write-Output "---PKG SCRIPTS---"; \(Get-Content package.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).scripts)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path build -Recurse -File | Select-Object -First 40 FullName, LastWriteTime; Write-Output "=== count ==="; \(Get-ChildItem -Path build -Recurse -File\).Count)
